scope: Port repeated provider overload fallback signaling into AgenC provider retry, config, and recovery switch paths

requiredBehaviors: trim fallback model and provider entries
canonicalize provider aliases and case before dedupe
deduplicate repeated fallback targets
skip the currently active provider/model pair
preserve optional target reason metadata
edgeCases: same-provider legacy fallback_models entries
cross-provider fallback targets
provider alias targets such as xai
empty model strings

requiredBehaviors: count consecutive fallback-eligible failures
trigger fallback on the third 529 by default
support custom status codes and custom thresholds
retry fallback wait decisions even when the status is outside the normal retry policy
treat configured fallback statuses as additive to built-in overload signals
propagate FallbackTriggeredError instead of wrapping it as a transport error
wire the configured ladder into the default provider request and stream paths
retry provider SSE overload events before streaming content or tool calls
delay and bound adapter-level fallback waits through the provider retry budget
bind fallback trigger metadata to request-scoped model overrides
preserve partial stream output instead of triggering fallback after content or tool calls
edgeCases: overloaded_error body marker without a clean 529 status
non-applicable errors reset the consecutive counter
the trigger fires before sleeping for the final failed attempt
custom fallback statuses outside the normal retry set
Responses API response.failed overload events
chat-completions and Anthropic stream error overload events
stream HTTP overloads before the SSE body opens
high fallback thresholds larger than the provider retry budget
request-scoped model override failures
partial stream output before an overload event
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/api/fallback-ladder.test.ts src/llm/api/retry.test.ts src/llm/client-session.test.ts src/llm/grok/adapter.test.ts src/llm/providers/openai/adapter.test.ts src/llm/providers/anthropic/adapter.test.ts

requiredBehaviors: accept provider fallback targets on the typed config path
normalize fallback models into provider/model target objects
carry max_failures and statuses into provider factory options
bind the active provider/model into the fallback ladder at bootstrap
edgeCases: duplicate configured statuses
legacy fallback_models mixed with explicit fallback.targets
environment-resolved API key remains available to fallback-created providers

requiredBehaviors: preserve fallback from/to model information
carry explicit from/to provider information when the retry ladder supplies it
stage pendingProviderSwitch with the fallback provider and model
rebuild cross-provider switches from ConfigStore provider settings
edgeCases: same-provider model fallback keeps the current provider identity
cross-provider fallback uses configured API key and base URL
provider rebuild failure clears the pending switch and emits rejection
